disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathless when lying flat; needs to prop up on three pillows and woke suddenly at night gasping for air
trigger_question_examples: Can you lie flat, or do you need to sit up to breathe?
Have you woken up at night short of breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't lie flat at all now — I need three pillows, and last night I woke up suddenly gasping for air and had to sit bolt upright.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New swelling of both legs over a few days, with a rapid rise in body weight
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling in your legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both my legs have swollen up like balloons over the last few days, and my weight's gone up about 4 kilos in a week.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Completed chemotherapy for breast cancer about 12 months ago, including a drug the patient names as doxorubicin
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions or past treatments I should know about?
Have you had any chemotherapy, and do you know which drugs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had breast cancer and finished chemo about a year ago — one of the drugs was called doxorubicin. I've never had heart trouble that I know of.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive breathlessness on exertion over about 3 weeks, now breathless at rest and speaking in short sentences
trigger_question_examples: When did the breathlessness start and how has it changed?
Are you short of breath even at rest now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It crept up over about three weeks when I was moving around, but the last couple of days it's been terrible — I'm puffed even sitting still and can only get a few words out at a time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Screen for circulatory compromise or acute cardiac event — chest pain, feeling faint, dizziness or confusion
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any chest pain or pressure?
Are you feeling faint, dizzy or confused at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain right now, and I'm not confused — but I do feel very weak and drained, and I get a bit lightheaded when I try to stand.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think so, I'm just so out of breath and tired.

trigger_question_examples: How are you coping day to day?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely drained and weak, like I've got no energy at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone, unable to access upstairs, no one at home to help
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you?
How are you managing at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own. I can't even get up the stairs to bed, so I've been sleeping in the recliner in the lounge. There's no one here to help me.

patient_initiated_exchanges.trigger_condition: Patient becomes frightened about the breathlessness
patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Is this something to do with my cancer coming back? Am I going to be alright?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Acknowledges fear without speculating on cause or minting a diagnosis; explains that the breathing and swelling need urgent in-person assessment tonight and arranges it, while giving a clear deterioration safety-net.
